size.note: mostly tests + docstrings; production source delta ~55 lines across tool.py + spawn_env.py + manager.py

completeness.note: every new source file has a dedicated test; test-first per EP-02

in_changes.summary: Credential-name exclusion used a suffix-only convention; AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID / GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS / SSH_AUTH_SOCK passed through (would reach the agent's fetch-path env).
in_changes.resolution: Added _CREDENTIAL_EXACT_NAMES allowlist + tests; the Rule-of-Two primary control now excludes these well-known credential vars.

lenses.architecture: nothing surfaced — tool.py is dependency-inward (imports only _safe_fetch.ports); spawn_env.py is pure; no new timeouts/circuit-breakers needed (proxy owns timeout per WP-002); no new circular imports.
lenses.security: 1 finding (F-01, fixed inline). No hardcoded secrets (test fixtures use pat_ catalogue shape). The shim is test-only + asserted un-importable from prod.
lenses.quality: no dead surface; no contract drift; CR-10 performance: no anti-pattern matches (child_spawn_env is one dict-comp over a small env map; no loops-with-IO/N+1). Test coverage: every new behaviour tested (test-first).
